item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p04","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer explicitly refuses adding another confirmation person at the sorting station, identifies the repeated pattern of downstream manual review/intercept/sampling gates across the prior incidents, reframes the issue as an upstream release-control failure across batch code, unlabeled items, warehouse location, and damaged-item rules, and proposes consolidating all four events into an upstream control review owned by the responsible rule/data owners. It does not provide the requested local manual-check patch."}
